summary: Rebrand re-verification (iteration 8) after main agent regenerated logo PNGs and updated stale test assertions. Result: PASS with one residual fix applied by testing agent. (1) Logo assets: visually verified via mobile viewport (375x667) screenshot — the circular badge on the landing screen now displays a clean 'SKS' navy monogram with subtle fingerprint arcs, NO baked-in 'SK SHARMA CONSULTANCY' wordmark. The regenerated logo-mark.png (16.5KB, mtime Jul 1 08:08) matches the current scripts/generate_logo.py output. Other assets (icon.png, adaptive-icon.png, splash-image.png, logo.png, favicon.png) all have the same mtime, confirming a full regen run. (2) Backend /api/ returns {"app":"S.K. Sharma & Co.","ok":true} — verified via curl through public preview URL. (3) Backend tests: 22/22 PASSED (test_otp_and_regression.py + test_resend_integration.py). The two target assertions (test_root_health line 31 -> j['app']=='S.K. Sharma & Co.', test_success_path_returns_email_id_and_persists line 165 -> from header 'S.K. Sharma & Co. <onboarding@resend.dev>') both hold. (4) Landing screen renders correctly: brand text 'S.K. Sharma' + '& Co.' on two lines, pills 'COMPLIANCE · PAYROLL · MANPOWER', legal footer 'By continuing you agree to S.K. Sharma & Co. Terms & Privacy.' — no 'Consultancy' string anywhere. (5) design_guidelines.json and /app/memory/*.md fully rebranded. FIX APPLIED BY TESTING AGENT: found two residual 'SK SHARMA CONSULTANCY' strings baked into HTML email templates in /app/backend/server.py lines 600 (OTP email header) and 1105 (company-request notification email header) — these were missed by earlier text sweep. Replaced with 'S.K. SHARMA & CO.'. Backend restarted; final grep for 'SK Sharma Consultancy' and 'SK SHARMA CONSULTANCY' (case-sensitive both variants) across /app (excluding node_modules, .metro-cache, test_reports) returns ZERO hits.

react_native_issues.issue: (Carry-over from iter 7, unresolved) Console warning 'shadow* style props are deprecated. Use boxShadow.' Reference: /app/src/theme.ts (shadow.card / shadow.cta consumed in /app/frontend/app/index.tsx). Not blocking but should migrate to boxShadow.
(Carry-over from iter 7, unresolved) 'Image: style.resizeMode is deprecated. Please use props.resizeMode.' from /app/frontend/app/index.tsx logo Image.

action_items: OPTIONAL / carry-over: address deprecated shadow* → boxShadow migration in /app/src/theme.ts and move Image resizeMode from style prop to props.resizeMode in index.tsx (non-blocking warnings only).
critical_code_review_comments: Rebrand is now fully clean across ALL layers: source .tsx, app.json, server.py (including previously-missed HTML email template headers), regenerated PNG assets, design_guidelines.json, memory docs, and backend test assertions.

Recommend adding a CI grep guard (e.g. pre-commit hook: fail if 'SK Sharma Consultancy' or 'SK SHARMA CONSULTANCY' appears outside test_reports/) to prevent regressions when future dev copy-pastes old snippets.
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py (fixed two 'SK SHARMA CONSULTANCY' -> 'S.K. SHARMA & CO.' strings at lines 600, 1105 inside HTML email templates)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (landing renders new brand; logo PNG no longer contains old wordmark)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Rebrand verification is COMPLETE. If touching this area again, only concern is the two carry-over React Native deprecation warnings (shadow* and expo-image resizeMode). Grep guard suggestion is optional. All email templates now use 'S.K. SHARMA & CO.' in the header eyebrow.
rca_of_issue: The iter-7 rebrand miss for logo PNGs is now resolved (main agent re-ran scripts/generate_logo.py, all six PNGs at Jul 1 08:08 mtime). Additional residual issue found by testing agent: two email-template HTML blocks in server.py (OTP login email + admin notification email) still contained the old 'SK SHARMA CONSULTANCY' eyebrow text — these were HTML-embedded strings that the earlier plain-text find/replace apparently missed because they were inside a large multi-line f-string. Fixed by testing agent; backend restarted; verified clean via case-sensitive grep for both spacings/casings.
